audience_policies.source_phrase: Type of pass: Paper, must be picked up from the library the week of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 6 people at $18 per adult and $12 per child (ages 5-17). Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount.
